ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., pit to pit, waist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the measurement (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard size system (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "style_number" TEXT /* Style number of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., top, bottom, dress, outerwear) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the product is designed for (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_values" (
  "measurement_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement value */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "value" REAL /* Measurement value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the measurement value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the measurement value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_values_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_values_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_measurements" (
  "product_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product measurement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "value" REAL /* Measurement value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_history" (
  "measurement_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement change */,
  "measurement_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement value being changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old measurement value */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New measurement value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the measurement change was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_history_measurement_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_value_id") REFERENCES measurement_values ("measurement_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_measurement_history" (
  "product_measurement_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product measurement change */,
  "product_measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product measurement being changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old measurement value */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New measurement value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product measurement change was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_measurement_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurement_history_product_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_measurement_id") REFERENCES product_measurements ("product_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_measurement_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inconsistencies" (
  "inconsistency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inconsistency */,
  "measurement_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement value with the inconsistency */,
  "inconsistency_type" TEXT /* Type of inconsistency (e.g., invalid value, out of range) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inconsistency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inconsistency was recorded */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the inconsistency */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inconsistency was resolved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inconsistency (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inconsistency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inconsistencies_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inconsistencies_measurement_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_value_id") REFERENCES measurement_values ("measurement_value_id")
)
